address: Pang Tong Royal Project, Tambon Mok Champae, Amphoe Muang, Mae Hong Son 58000

description.en: Stunning mountain reservoir at 1,800 meters elevation surrounded by pine forests, nicknamed Thailand's Switzerland. Offers tent camping and bamboo raft house accommodation on the lake with unforgettable morning mist and stargazing.
description.nl: Prachtig bergstuwmeer op 1.800 meter hoogte omringd door dennenbossen, bijgenaamd Thailand's Zwitserland. Biedt tentcamping en bamboe vlothuisaccommodatie op het meer met onvergetelijke ochtendmist en sterrenkijken.

metaTitle.en: Pang Ung - Top Attraction in Mae Hong Son | Go2Thailand
metaTitle.nl: Pang Ung - Top Attractie in Mae Hong Son | Go2Thailand

metaDescription.en: Discover Pang Ung in Mae Hong Son. Mountain reservoir surrounded by pine forests nicknamed Thailand's Switzerland.
metaDescription.nl: Ontdek Pang Ung in Mae Hong Son. Bergstuwmeer omringd door dennenbossen, bijgenaamd Thailand's Zwitserland.
